creator: tomas@ciernik.sk
text:
It seems error is caused by adding DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=ssl=openssl into make.conf (please see log at https://sona.ciernik.sk/poudriere/data/test_122x64-default/2021-03-15_16h55m50s/logs/errors/iksemel-1.5.log ).

Same behaviour on FreeBSD 11.4.

Ports tree was refreshed just minutes ago.

# poudriere ports -l
PORTSTREE METHOD   TIMESTAMP           PATH
default   portsnap 2021-03-15 16:54:52 /virtuals/poudriere/ports/default
